title: 9 Herbal Teas For Edema
description: Glycyrrhiza glabra teas contains the bioactive constituents glycyrrhizin and flavonoids. Glycyrrhizin has anti-inflammatory and diuretic properties, which help reduce fluid retention and swelling in the body. It does this by inhibiting the action of aldosterone, a hormone that regulates sodium and water balance in the body.
